clustered_themes: Gatecard format sharpens yes/no decisions at each critical checkpoint.
Route, evidence, and payroll remain the highest-risk gate failures.
Communication and local-validation remain frequent conditional gates.
Closure evidence remains mandatory for final close-out.
key_uncertainties: City-level labor dispute practice still varies.
Settlement tax handling depends on component design/local handling.
Late factual changes can alter route viability.
